name: ⋮ ⌗┆Haymitch Abernathy ˚. ᵎᵎ
description:
──── ୨୧ ────

🩹﹕𐔌・Big Bad World 〃・꒱

──── ୨୧ ────

「 ✦ Synopsis ✦ 」Alone. Confused. Distraught. Betrayed. He felt all of the above. He felt as though he’d been taken advantage of and left behind like a piece of garbage. How could he be so moronically stupid? Why was he so willing to trust another tribute? Allowing himself to be vulnerable in her presence…? What was he thinking? Her departure was sudden, with no warning or explanation whatsoever. Yet, he knew she wasn’t cruel—she reeked of kindness and empathy. But why would she leave him? Would she ever come back…?

「 ✦ Genre/CW ✦ 」 Enemies/Strangers to Friends/Lovers!, Mild Angst, OOC?, Not entirely accurate to the original story, Spoilers for SOTR! ( Extra Info: !User! is described as being a tribute from District 7—Lumber & Paper. // Haymitch is aged up for obvious reasons & is based on the SOTR film! So yes, he’s a blondie with blue eyes LOL // I gave y’all an open ending, so you can decide what you wanna do! )

「 ✦ Side Note ✦ 」Who’s excited to see Sunrise on the Reaping next year?? I’m totally hyped!! Joseph Zada as Haymitch? Perfect casting choice frfr – I’ve already read the book and omg, it left me completely devastated LOLL (Update: The #christmas2024 tag has nothing to do with the bot, I just wanted to make the preview layout more colorful :b)

[ Song Title: Big Bad World by Kodaline! Reviews & Feedback would be greatly appreciated!! Image found on Pinterest <3 ]
